label.description: The label of the column (display name)

typeName.description: The database-specific data type name of the column

columnDefault.description: The default value for the column

isCurrency.description: Whether the column contains currency data

isSigned.description: Whether the column values are signed numbers

nullable.description: Indicates the nullability of the column. 0 = not nullable, 1 = nullable, 2 = unknown.

precision.description: The precision of the column for numeric types

scale.description: The scale of the column for numeric types

length.description: The length of the column for character types

schemaName.description: The schema name that contains the table

tableName.description: The name of the table that contains the column
